summary: The diff implements loading timeout handling and React Query optimizations across frontend components, and adds query methods to the backend. All three requirements appear to be addressed with enhanced error handling, retry logic, and proper loading state management.

hallucinated_features.description: Added getProductCount() and getProductCountByCategory() query methods to backend
hallucinated_features.reason: These new backend query methods were not requested in the BuildRequest. REQ-2 asked to review and optimize backend actor initialization and authentication flow, not to add new query endpoints.

hallucinated_features.description: Added getProductsByCategory() query method to backend
hallucinated_features.reason: This new backend query method was not requested. The BuildRequest focused on fixing loading timeouts and authentication flow, not adding category-based filtering functionality to the backend.
